title: Map Marking Fix
description: Put your drawings back inside the margins
body:
Information
---
The markings on maps are annoyingly one pixel away from perfection.

I fixed it

Versions
---
This should work in 1.14 to current.

Currently no plans for older versions.

Have issues or a suggestion?
---
Report it on the Github issue tracker so I know I need to fix something :D

This tweak not for you?
---
Check out my other projects, I might have something you didn't know you needed! :D
